intro: Bud-E has two buttons — REC and PWR — that do everything on the device. This is the full gesture + feature reference. (Edit features.json to keep it current.)

rows.result: Talk to Bud-E (push-to-talk) — speak, release, he answers aloud
Sleeps — tired face, then sleepy screen + battery %

sections.title: Menu (press PWR from home)
sections.note: Items: Record · Notes · Tags · Timer · Pomodoro · Sync · Settings

sections.title: Talk to Bud-E
sections.note: Uses your calendar, weather, and Productive tasks. First ask shows a brief 'connecting'; follow-ups are quick.

rows.result: Records → thinking → speaks the answer + shows text → home
Cycle the tag (Note / Work / Idea / Buy / Private)
Transcribes + adds title/summary/to-dos, and uploads to the dashboard
Cycle tags, then show only that tag's notes

sections.title: Settings on the device (Menu → Settings)
sections.note: Items: Sounds · Desk Mode · Transfer · Device

rows.result: REC toggles always-on desk mode (stays awake + online for nudges — keep plugged in)
Starts the on-device web page (shows an IP to open on your WiFi)

sections.title: Desk mode (always-on nudges)
sections.note: Plug Bud-E into USB power, then Menu → Settings → Desk Mode → on. The setting sticks across reboots.

rows.result: Bud-E stays awake, holds WiFi, and checks the Mac for nudges every ~30s
Face perks up + a chime + he speaks the heads-up aloud, then back to blinking
Drops WiFi and returns to normal battery behavior (sleeps after ~2 min idle)
Auto-sleeps to protect the cell even in desk mode (plug back in to resume)

rows.do: Hold REC (BOOT) → tap RESET → release REC
rows.result: Enters download mode, then Upload in Arduino IDE
Auto at 8:00 AM (spoken on the Mac), or the 🌅 Briefing button (Conversations)
Auto at 5:30 PM (what's left today + a peek at tomorrow), or the 🌙 Wrap-up button
Spoken heads-up ~15 min before a calendar event, and again as it starts (toggle + lead time in Settings)
Settings → 'Nudge plays on': Bud-E device (in desk mode), the Mac, or auto (device when it's online, else the Mac). 🔔 test button included
Notes tab — search, filter by tag, play audio
Notes tab dropdown → takes effect next Sync
Used in every answer and the morning briefing
